---
title: "Single-Cell Transcriptomic Profiling of Early Kidney Dysfunction in Youth-Onset Type 2 Diabetes"
author: "Hailey Hampson"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-color: "#a53860"
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "Outline"
    number-sections: false
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 6
    self-contained: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    header-includes: |
      <style>
        .reveal .slide-number { font-size: 0.7em; }
        .reveal h1 { color: #001219; }
        .reveal h2 { color: #a53860; border-bottom: 2px solid #9b2226; padding-bottom: 4px; }
        .reveal h3 { color: #9b2226; }
        .reveal table { font-size: 0.75em; }
        .caption { font-size: 0.7em; color: #555; }
        .reveal ul { list-style-type: disc; }
        .reveal ul ul { list-style-type: circle; padding-left: 2em; }
        .reveal .quarto-title-block .quarto-title,
        .reveal .quarto-title-block .subtitle,
        .reveal .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-authors,
        .reveal .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-meta {
          color: #e9d8a6 !important;
        }
        .reveal .slides section a {
          color: #000000 !important;
        }
        .reveal .slides section {
          overflow-y: auto !important;
          max-height: 85vh !important;
        }
        .reveal section[data-background-color="#a53860"] h1,
        .reveal section[data-background-color="#a53860"] h2,
        .reveal section[data-background-color="#001219"] h1,
        .reveal section[data-background-color="#001219"] h2 {
          color: #e9d8a6 !important;
          border-bottom-color: #ee9b00 !important;
        }
      </style>
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    results: 'asis'

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("/home/hhampson/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Kidney scRNA/Kidney scRNA/Libraries.R")

pal <- list(
  ink_black       = "#001219",
  dark_cyan       = "#0a9396",
  pearl_aqua      = "#94d2bd",
  vanilla_custard = "#e9d8a6",
  golden_orange   = "#ee9b00",
  burnt_caramel   = "#ca6702",
  rusty_spice     = "#bb3e03",
  oxidized_iron   = "#ae2012",
  brown_red       = "#9b2226"
)
pal2 <- list(
  soft_apricot = "#f9dbbdff",
  cotton_candy = "#ffa5abff",
  blush_rose = "#da627dff",
  berry_crush = "#a53860ff",
  night_bordeaux = "#450920ff"
)
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("/home/hhampson/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Kidney scRNA/Kidney scRNA/Libraries.R")

# ── S3 / Kopah connection ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(aws.s3)
library(paws)

s3 <- paws::s3(config = list(
  credentials = list(
    creds = list(
      access_key_id     = Sys.getenv("AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID"),
      secret_access_key = Sys.getenv("AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY")
    )
  ),
  endpoint = Sys.getenv("AWS_S3_ENDPOINT"),
  region   = Sys.getenv("AWS_REGION")
))

# ── Palettes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pal <- list(
  ink_black       = "#001219",
  ...
)
```

```{r nebula-shared-helpers, cache=FALSE}

# ── Filename stem extractor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
ct_from_nebula_file <- function(paths, prefix_pat, suffix_pat) {
  bn <- basename(paths)
  bn <- sub(prefix_pat, "", bn)
  bn <- sub(suffix_pat, "", bn)
  bn
}

# ── NEBULA volcano (generic: pass logfc/pval/fdr column names) ────────────────
make_nebula_volcano <- function(df,
                                ct_label,
                                logfc_col,
                                pval_col,
                                fdr_col,
                                n_label = 20,
                                title_extra = "") {

  # defensive: try dot-variant if underscore variant missing
  try_col <- function(df, col) {
    if (col %in% colnames(df)) return(col)
    alt <- chartr("_", ".", col)
    if (alt %in% colnames(df)) return(alt)
    NA_character_
  }
  logfc_col <- try_col(df, logfc_col)
  pval_col  <- try_col(df, pval_col)
  fdr_col   <- try_col(df, fdr_col)

  if (any(is.na(c(logfc_col, pval_col, fdr_col)))) {
    return(ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = .5, y = .5,
               label = paste("Column not found\nin", ct_label),
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void())
  }

  gene_col <- if ("gene" %in% colnames(df)) "gene" else
              if ("Gene" %in% colnames(df)) "Gene" else NA_character_

  df <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      .logfc     = .data[[logfc_col]],
      .pval      = .data[[pval_col]],
      .fdr       = .data[[fdr_col]],
      neg_log10p = -log10(pmax(.pval, 1e-300)),
      direction  = dplyr::case_when(
        .fdr < 0.05 & .logfc > 0 ~ "Up",
        .fdr < 0.05 & .logfc < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  to_label <- if (!is.na(gene_col)) {
    top_up   <- df |> dplyr::filter(.logfc > 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(.pval, n = n_label)
    top_down <- df |> dplyr::filter(.logfc < 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(.pval, n = n_label)
    dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down) |> dplyr::mutate(.label = .data[[gene_col]])
  } else { data.frame() }

  n_cells <- dplyr::coalesce(
    df$Cells[1], df$Nuclei[1], NA_real_
  )

  subtitle_text <- paste0(
    "Genes: ", format(nrow(df), big.mark = ","),
    "  |  Cells: ", format(n_cells, big.mark = ","),
    "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"
  )

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .logfc, y = neg_log10p, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Up" = "#9b2226", "Down" = "#001219", "NS" = "grey70")
    ) +
    labs(
      x        = "log2 Fold Change",
      y        = "-log10(P-value)",
      title    = paste0("NEBULA Volcano", title_extra, ": ", ct_label),
      subtitle = subtitle_text,
      color    = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50")
    )

  if (!is.na(gene_col) && nrow(to_label) > 0) {
    p <- p + ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = to_label,
      aes(label = .label),
      size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 30, segment.size = 0.2
    )
  }
  p
}

# ── NEBULA GSEA runner (fgsea on NEBULA t-stats) ──────────────────────────────
# Ranks genes by signed -log10(p) * sign(logFC) — a common NEBULA ranking
run_nebula_gsea <- function(df,
                            logfc_col,
                            pval_col,
                            gene_col = NULL,
                            nperm    = 10000,
                            min_size = 15,
                            max_size = 500) {

  try_col <- function(df, col) {
    if (!is.null(col) && col %in% colnames(df)) return(col)
    if (!is.null(col)) { alt <- chartr("_", ".", col); if (alt %in% colnames(df)) return(alt) }
    NA_character_
  }

  logfc_col <- try_col(df, logfc_col)
  pval_col  <- try_col(df, pval_col)

  if (is.null(gene_col)) {
    gene_col <- if ("gene" %in% colnames(df)) "gene" else
                if ("Gene" %in% colnames(df)) "Gene" else NA_character_
  }

  if (any(is.na(c(logfc_col, pval_col, gene_col)))) return(NULL)

  # Reactome gene sets
  msig <- msigdbr::msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens",
                            category = "C2", subcategory = "CP:REACTOME") |>
    dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)
  pathways <- split(msig$gene_symbol, msig$gs_name)

  # Ranking: sign(logFC) * -log10(p)
  ranks <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[pval_col]]), !is.na(.data[[logfc_col]])) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      stat = sign(.data[[logfc_col]]) * (-log10(pmax(.data[[pval_col]], 1e-300)))
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(stat)) |>
    dplyr::distinct(.data[[gene_col]], .keep_all = TRUE)

  rank_vec <- setNames(ranks$stat, ranks[[gene_col]])

  set.seed(42)
  fgsea::fgsea(
    pathways  = pathways,
    stats     = rank_vec,
    minSize   = min_size,
    maxSize   = max_size,
    nPermSimple = nperm
  ) |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"),
      padj_bh     = p.adjust(pval, method = "BH")
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(pval)
}

# ── GSEA bar for NEBULA (re-uses your existing make_gsea_bar style) ───────────
make_nebula_gsea_bar <- function(gsea_df, ct_label, n_show = 20,
                                 title_extra = "") {
  if (is.null(gsea_df) || nrow(gsea_df) == 0) {
    return(
      ggplot() +
        annotate("text", x = .5, y = .5,
                 label = "No GSEA results", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
        theme_void() +
        labs(title = paste0("NEBULA GSEA", title_extra, ": ", ct_label))
    )
  }

  df <- gsea_df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      pathway_clean = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
      pathway_clean = gsub("_", " ", pathway_clean),
      pathway_clean = stringr::str_to_title(pathway_clean),
      n_genes = size,
      sig     = pval < 0.05
    )

  n_up   <- ceiling(n_show / 2)
  n_down <- floor(n_show / 2)
  top_up   <- df |> dplyr::filter(NES > 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = n_up)
  top_down <- df |> dplyr::filter(NES < 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = n_down)
  df_plot  <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down) |> dplyr::arrange(NES)
  df_plot$pathway_clean <- factor(df_plot$pathway_clean,
                                  levels = df_plot$pathway_clean)

  max_abs <- max(abs(df_plot$NES), na.rm = TRUE)

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = NES, y = pathway_clean)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = ifelse(sig, NES, NA_real_))) +
    geom_text(aes(label = n_genes,
                  x     = ifelse(NES > 0, NES - 0.05, NES + 0.05),
                  hjust = ifelse(NES > 0, 1, 0)),
              size = 2.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low      = pal$ink_black,
      mid      = "white",
      high     = pal$brown_red,
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-max_abs, max_abs),
      name     = "NES",
      na.value = "grey70"
    ) +
    labs(
      x        = "Normalized Enrichment Score",
      y        = NULL,
      title    = paste0("NEBULA GSEA", title_extra, ": ", ct_label),
      subtitle = "Color = P < 0.05; grey = NS"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50")
    )
}

# ── Leading-edge gene table (same style as limma version) ─────────────────────
extract_nebula_top_genes <- function(gsea_df, n_show = 20, n_genes_show = 10) {
  if (is.null(gsea_df) || nrow(gsea_df) == 0) return(NULL)

  gsea_df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      pathway_clean = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
      pathway_clean = gsub("_", " ", pathway_clean),
      pathway_clean = stringr::str_to_title(pathway_clean)
    ) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = n_show) |>
    dplyr::arrange(pval) |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      top_genes = tryCatch({
        le <- as.character(leadingEdge)
        if (length(le) == 0 || is.null(le) || all(is.na(le)) || le == "" || le == "NA") ""
        else paste(utils::head(base::strsplit(le, ";")[[1]], n_genes_show), collapse = ", ")
      }, error = function(e) "")
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::select(
      Pathway             = pathway_clean,
      NES,
      `P-Value`           = pval,
      `Leading Edge Genes`= top_genes
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      NES       = round(NES, 2),
      `P-Value` = formatC(`P-Value`, format = "e", digits = 2)
    )
}

# ── EMM heatmap from NEBULA interaction results ───────────────────────────────
# Computes group-mean log-expression as a proxy for EMMs when the full
# mixed-model object is unavailable (i.e. we only have the saved CSV).
# Uses top N genes by interaction FDR.
make_nebula_emm_heatmap <- function(so_sub,
                                    ct_label,
                                    n_top      = 50,
                                    int_fdr_col  = "fdr_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30",
                                    int_lfc_col  = "logFC_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30",
                                    results_df = NULL) {

  # Identify top interaction genes from results CSV
  if (!is.null(results_df)) {
    # try both naming conventions
    fdr_col_use <- if (int_fdr_col %in% colnames(results_df)) int_fdr_col else
                   chartr("_", ".", int_fdr_col)
    lfc_col_use <- if (int_lfc_col %in% colnames(results_df)) int_lfc_col else
                   chartr("_", ".", int_lfc_col)

    gene_col <- if ("gene" %in% colnames(results_df)) "gene" else "Gene"

    top_genes <- results_df |>
      dplyr::arrange(.data[[fdr_col_use]]) |>
      dplyr::slice_head(n = n_top) |>
      dplyr::pull(.data[[gene_col]])
  } else {
    # fall back: use HVGs
    top_genes <- head(VariableFeatures(so_sub), n_top)
  }

  top_genes <- intersect(top_genes, rownames(so_sub))
  if (length(top_genes) < 2) return(NULL)

  # Pull normalized counts
  DefaultAssay(so_sub) <- "RNA"
  expr_mat <- as.matrix(Seurat::GetAssayData(so_sub, layer = "data")[top_genes, , drop = FALSE])

  # Build condition label per cell
  meta <- so_sub@meta.data |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      cond = paste0(
        dplyr::case_when(group == "Type 2 Diabetes" ~ "T2D",
                         group == "T2D"              ~ "T2D",
                         TRUE                         ~ "LC"),
        "_",
        dplyr::case_when(grepl("30", treatment) ~ "30mM",
                         TRUE                   ~ "15mM")
      )
    )

  # Mean per condition
  conds   <- unique(meta$cond)
  emm_mat <- sapply(conds, function(cc) {
    cells <- rownames(meta)[meta$cond == cc]
    rowMeans(expr_mat[, cells, drop = FALSE])
  })

  # Reorder columns
  col_order <- intersect(c("LC_15mM", "LC_30mM", "T2D_15mM", "T2D_30mM"),
                         colnames(emm_mat))
  emm_mat <- emm_mat[, col_order, drop = FALSE]

  # Scale rows
  hm_scaled <- t(scale(t(emm_mat)))

  col_annot <- data.frame(
    Group     = c("LC", "LC", "T2D", "T2D"),
    Treatment = c("15mM", "30mM", "15mM", "30mM"),
    row.names = c("LC_15mM", "LC_30mM", "T2D_15mM", "T2D_30mM")
  )[col_order, , drop = FALSE]

  annot_colors <- list(
    Group     = c("LC" = pal$dark_cyan, "T2D" = pal$brown_red),
    Treatment = c("15mM" = pal$vanilla_custard, "30mM" = pal$golden_orange)
  )

  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    hm_scaled,
    cluster_cols      = FALSE,
    cluster_rows      = TRUE,
    show_rownames     = TRUE,
    fontsize_row      = 7,
    fontsize_col      = 10,
    color             = colorRampPalette(c(pal$ink_black, "white", pal$brown_red))(100),
    annotation_col    = col_annot,
    annotation_colors = annot_colors,
    main              = paste0(ct_label, " — NEBULA Top Interaction Genes (mean expr)"),
    border_color      = NA,
    silent            = TRUE
  )
}

# ── DEG concordance helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
compute_concordance <- function(df_a, df_b,
                                gene_col_a, lfc_col_a, fdr_col_a,
                                gene_col_b, lfc_col_b, fdr_col_b,
                                fdr_thresh = 0.05) {
  sig_a <- df_a |>
    dplyr::filter(.data[[fdr_col_a]] < fdr_thresh) |>
    dplyr::select(gene = dplyr::all_of(gene_col_a),
                  lfc_a = dplyr::all_of(lfc_col_a))
  sig_b <- df_b |>
    dplyr::filter(.data[[fdr_col_b]] < fdr_thresh) |>
    dplyr::select(gene = dplyr::all_of(gene_col_b),
                  lfc_b = dplyr::all_of(lfc_col_b))
  shared <- dplyr::inner_join(sig_a, sig_b, by = "gene") |>
    dplyr::mutate(concordant = sign(lfc_a) == sign(lfc_b))
  list(n_a = nrow(sig_a), n_b = nrow(sig_b),
       n_shared = nrow(shared),
       n_concordant = sum(shared$concordant, na.rm = TRUE))
}
```



# Background {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}

## Background

- Diabetic nephropathy — leading cause of end-stage renal disease in United States^1^
- Youth-onset type 2 diabetes (T2D) shows more aggressive progression to Diabetic Kidney Disease (DKD) than adult^2^
- Hyperglycemia drives kidney damage through multiple pathways including oxidative stress, inflammation, metabolic dysregulation, and podocyte injury^3^
- Cellular mechanisms of glucose-induced kidney damage remain incompletely understood
- Kidney organoids derived from patient cells offer a controlled environment to model diabetes-related pathology in vitro^4^
- Single-cell RNA sequencing enables identification of cell type-specific responses to diabetic conditions^5^

::: {.caption}
1. Rabkin. Diabetic nephropathy 2003
2. Dart et al. Diabetes Care 2012
3. Jha et al. Antioxid Redox Signal 2016
4. Nakanoh et al. Life (Basel) 2025
5. Deng et al. Diabetes 2025
:::

## Research Aims Part 1: Diabetes-Driven Transcriptional Profiles
- **Aim 1.1:** Identify diabetes-driven transcriptional signatures in kidney organoids.
- *Research Question 1.1:* How does gene expression differ between kidney organoids derived from youth with type 2 diabetes (T2D) and lean controls (LC)?
- **Aim 1.2:** Identify diabetes-driven transcriptional signatures in kidney biopsies.
- *Research Question 1.2:* How does gene expression differ between kidney tissue biopsies from youth with T2D and LC?
- **Aim 1.3:** Compare diabetes-driven molecular profiles between kidney organoids and kidney biopsies.
- *Research Question 1.3:* How do diabetes-related molecular profiles compare between kidney organoids and kidney biopsies?
- **Aim 1.4:** Identify glucose-induced transcriptional signatures in kidney organoids. 
- *Research Question 1.4:* How does gene expression differ between kidney organoids with high glucose exposure (30mM) and low glucose exposure (15mM)?

## Research Aims Part 2: T2D-specific glucose response signatures in organoid models
- **Aim 2:** Characterize glucose-induced transcriptional changes in T2D compared to LC organoid models.
- *Research Question 2:* How do gene expression profiles differ in response to hyperglycemia (30 mM vs. 15 mM glucose concentrations) in T2D versus LC kidney organoids.


# Methods {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}

## Methods
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
- Participants enrolled in the CROCODILE study (N = 3) & RENAL-HEIR study (N = 3)
- Collected demographics, anthropometrics, kidney tissue biopsy & blood samples
- Kidney organoids derived from blood samples (iPSC → organoid, Freedman et al. 2018)
- Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNAseq) on matched kidney biopsies & kidney organoids
- Organoids exposed to **15 mM** (physiologic) and **30 mM** (hyperglycemic) glucose
:::
::: {.column width="55%"}
```{r}
#| out-width: "100%"
# knitr::include_graphics("/home/hhampson/Results/methods_figure.png")
library(base64enc)

img_raw <- s3$get_object(Bucket = "scrna", Key = "Kidney organoids/Methods.png")$Body
img_b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(img_raw)

knitr::raw_html(paste0('<img src="data:image/png;base64,', img_b64, '" style="width:100%;">'))
```
:::
::::

## NEBULA — Organoids {.scrollable}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="100%"}
**Single-Cell Mixed-Effects Model (NEBULA)**

- Unit of analysis: individual cells, with subject-level random effect
- Negative binomial distribution to handle overdispersion and zero-inflation
- Sequencing depth offset included to account for technical noise

**Research Aim 1 — T2D vs. LC (adjusted for glucose):**

$$\log(\mu_{ij}) = \beta_0 + \beta_1(\text{T2D})_i + \beta_2(\text{Glucose30mM})_i + u_i + \varepsilon_{ij}$$

- $\beta_1$ = main effect of T2D status (T2D vs. LC, adjusted for glucose) — *primary parameter of interest*
- $\beta_2$ = main effect of glucose treatment — *covariate adjustment*

**Research Aim 2 — T2D × Glucose Interaction:**

$$\log(\mu_{ij}) = \beta_0 + \beta_1(\text{T2D})_i + \beta_2(\text{Glucose30mM})_i + \beta_3(\text{T2D} \times \text{Glucose30mM})_i + u_i + \varepsilon_{ij}$$

- $\beta_3$ = T2D-specific glucose response — *primary parameter of interest*
- $u_i$ = random effect for subject $i$ (within-subject correlation across glucose conditions)
:::
::::

## NEBULA — Biopsies

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="100%"}
**Single-Cell Mixed-Effects Model (NEBULA)**

- Unit of analysis: individual cells, with subject-level random effect
- Negative binomial distribution to handle overdispersion and zero-inflation
- No glucose treatment condition (cross-sectional biopsy data)

**Model — T2D vs. LC:**

$$\log(\mu_{ij}) = \beta_0 + \beta_1(\text{T2D})_i + u_i + \varepsilon_{ij}$$

- $\beta_0$ = baseline expression (intercept; LC group, reference)
- $\beta_1$ = main effect of T2D status — *primary parameter of interest*
- $u_i$ = random effect for subject $i$ (within-subject correlation across cell types)

| Feature | Detail |
|---|---|
| Random effect | Subject (`kit_id`) |
| Distribution | Negative binomial |
| Multiple testing | BH (FDR) |
| GSEA | fgsea (Reactome) |
:::
::::

## Pseudobulk — Organoids

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="100%"}
**Pseudobulk Differential Expression (Limma-voom)**

Counts aggregated per `record_id × treatment × cell_type` using `AggregateExpression()`, TMM normalized via edgeR

**Research Aim 1 — T2D vs. LC (adjusted for glucose):**
$$\log(\mu_{ij}) = \beta_0 + \beta_1(\text{T2D})_i + \beta_2(\text{Glucose30mM})_i$$

**Research Aim 2 — Interaction model (EMM):**
$$\log(\mu_{ij}) = \beta_0 + \beta_1(\text{T2D})_i + \beta_2(\text{Glucose30mM})_i + \beta_3(\text{T2D} \times \text{Glucose30mM})_i$$

Estimated marginal means extracted for all four group × treatment combinations via `contrasts.fit`

| Step | Method |
|---|---|
| Aggregation | `AggregateExpression()` per subject × treatment |
| Normalization | TMM (edgeR) |
| Filtering | `filterByExpr` |
| DE | Limma-voom + `eBayes` |
| Correction | BH (FDR) |
| GSEA | fgsea (Reactome, 10k permutations) |

**Significance:** adj.P.Val < 0.05
:::
::::

## Pseudobulk — Biopsies

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="100%"}
**Pseudobulk Differential Expression (Limma-voom)**

Counts aggregated per `kit_id × cell_type` using `AggregateExpression()`, TMM normalized via edgeR. No treatment condition — cross-sectional design.

**Model — T2D vs. LC:**
$$\log(\mu_{ij}) = \beta_0 + \beta_1(\text{T2D})_i$$

- No random effect (pseudobulk collapses to one observation per subject)
- Moderated t-statistics via empirical Bayes (`eBayes`)

| Step | Method |
|---|---|
| Aggregation | `AggregateExpression()` per `kit_id` |
| Normalization | TMM (edgeR) |
| Filtering | `filterByExpr` |
| DE | Limma-voom + `eBayes` |
| Correction | BH (FDR) |
| GSEA | fgsea (Reactome, 10k permutations) |

**Significance:** adj.P.Val < 0.05
:::
::::


# Results {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}

## Table 1 — Participant Demographics {.scrollable}

```{r table1}
t1_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results/table1_demographics.html")

htmltools::HTML(readLines(t1_file, warn = FALSE))

```

## UMAPs - Organoid & Biopsy

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Organoid**
```{r}
img_raw <- s3$get_object(Bucket = "scrna", Key = "Kidney organoids/UMAP_celltype_bold_labels_v2.png")$Body
img_b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(img_raw)
knitr::raw_html(paste0('<img src="data:image/png;base64,', img_b64, '" style="width:100%;">'))
```
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Biopsy**
```{r}
img_raw <- s3$get_object(Bucket = "scrna", Key = "Kidney organoids/UMAP_celltype_biopsy.png")$Body
img_b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(img_raw)
knitr::raw_html(paste0('<img src="data:image/png;base64,', img_b64, '" style="width:100%;">'))
```
:::
::::

# Aim 1.1: Type 2 Diabetes vs. Lean Controls in Organoids {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}

##  Organoid: Pseudobulk (LIMMA) - T2D vs. LC (Adj. Glucose Exposure) {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}
```{r load-and-plot-functions, cache=FALSE}
# ── Load all limma results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
limma_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma T2D vs. LC",
                          pattern = "^limma_T2DvsLC_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
limma_files <- limma_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", limma_files)]
results_all <- purrr::map_dfr(limma_files, read.csv)

# ── Load all GSEA results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
gsea_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma T2D vs. LC",
                         pattern = "^gsea_reactome_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
gsea_files <- gsea_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", gsea_files)]
gsea_results_list <- purrr::map(gsea_files, read.csv) |>
  setNames(gsub("gsea_reactome_T2DvsLC_|\\.csv$", "", basename(gsea_files)))

cell_counts <- read.csv("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma T2D vs. LC/cell_counts_per_celltype.csv")

# ── Volcano plot function (adj.P.Val for coloring, P.Value for y-axis) ────────
make_volcano <- function(df, ct, n_label = 20, cell_counts_df = cell_counts) {
  n_genes <- nrow(df)
  n_cells <- cell_counts_df$n_cells[cell_counts_df$cell_type == ct]
  if (length(n_cells) == 0) n_cells <- NA
  
  df <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      neg_log10p = -log10(P.Value),
      direction = dplyr::case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "Up",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )
  
  top_up <- df |> dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(P.Value, n = n_label)
  top_down <- df |> dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(P.Value, n = n_label)
  to_label <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)
  
  subtitle_text <- paste0("Genes: ", format(n_genes, big.mark = ","),
                          "  |  Cells: ", format(n_cells, big.mark = ","),
                          "  |  Color = adj. P < 0.05")
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10p, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    geom_text_repel(data = to_label, aes(label = gene),
                    size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 30, segment.size = 0.2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = pal$brown_red, "Down" = pal$ink_black, "NS" = "grey70")) +
    labs(x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(P-value)",
         title = "Volcano Plot",
         subtitle = subtitle_text,
         color = NULL) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50"))
}

# ── GSEA bar plot function (nominal pval for selection & sig coloring) ────────
make_gsea_bar <- function(df, ct, n_show = 20) {
  df <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      pathway_clean = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
      pathway_clean = gsub("_", " ", pathway_clean),
      pathway_clean = stringr::str_to_title(pathway_clean),
      n_genes = size,
      sig = pval < 0.05
    ) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = n_show) |>
    dplyr::arrange(NES)
  
  df$pathway_clean <- factor(df$pathway_clean, levels = df$pathway_clean)
  max_abs <- max(abs(df$NES), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = NES, y = pathway_clean)) +
    # geom_col(aes(fill = ifelse(sig, NES, NA))) +
    # geom_col(data = df |> dplyr::filter(!sig), fill = "grey70") +
    geom_col(aes(fill = ifelse(sig, NES, NA_real_))) +
    geom_text(aes(label = n_genes,
                  x = ifelse(NES > 0, NES - 0.05, NES + 0.05),
                  hjust = ifelse(NES > 0, 1, 0)),
              size = 2.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = pal$ink_black, mid = "white", high = pal$brown_red,
                         midpoint = 0, limits = c(-max_abs, max_abs),
                         name = "NES", na.value = "grey70") +
    labs(x = "Normalized Enrichment Score", y = NULL,
         title = "Reactome GSEA",
         subtitle = "Color = P < 0.05; grey = NS") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50"))
}

# ── Function to extract top genes per pathway (nominal pval) ──────────────────
extract_top_genes <- function(df, ct, n_show = 20, n_genes_show = 10) {
  df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      pathway_clean = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
      pathway_clean = gsub("_", " ", pathway_clean),
      pathway_clean = stringr::str_to_title(pathway_clean)
    ) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = n_show) |>
    dplyr::arrange(pval) |>
    dplyr::rowwise() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      top_genes = tryCatch({
        le <- as.character(leadingEdge)
        if (length(le) == 0 || is.null(le) || all(is.na(le)) || le == "" || le == "NA") {
          ""
        } else {
          genes <- base::strsplit(le, ";")[[1]]
          base::paste(utils::head(genes, n_genes_show), collapse = ", ")
        }
      }, error = function(e) "")
    ) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::select(Pathway = pathway_clean, NES, `P-Value` = pval, `Leading Edge Genes` = top_genes) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      NES = round(NES, 2),
      `P-Value` = formatC(`P-Value`, format = "e", digits = 2)
    )
}
```

```{r per-celltype-combined, fig.width=14, fig.height=6, results='asis', cache=FALSE}
gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(results_all$cell_type)) {
  
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  p_volc <- make_volcano(results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct), ct)
  
  if (ct %in% names(gsea_results_list)) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(gsea_results_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
    gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(gsea_results_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No Significantly Enriched Pathways",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }
  
  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea +
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.2))
  
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

```{r gsea-gene-tables, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n# GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color=\"#a53860\"}\n\n")

for (ct in names(gene_tables)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " — Leading Edge Genes {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  tbl <- gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")
  
  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Organoid: Single-Cell (NEBULA) - T2D vs. LC (Adj. Glucose Exposure) {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r}

# Load NEBULA DE results
nebula_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/T2DvsLC NEBULA",
                           pattern = "^NEBULA_T2DvsLC_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
nebula_results_all <- purrr::map_dfr(nebula_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.csv(f)
  ct <- gsub("^NEBULA_T2DvsLC_(.*)_treatment_adjusted_2000\\.csv$", "\\1", basename(f))
  df$cell_type <- ct
  df
})

# Load NEBULA GSEA results from RDS
nebula_gsea_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/T2DvsLC NEBULA",
                                pattern = "_T2DvsLC_Reactome\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
nebula_gsea_list <- purrr::map(nebula_gsea_files, readRDS) |>
  setNames(gsub("_T2DvsLC_Reactome\\.rds$", "", basename(nebula_gsea_files)))
```

```{r}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, out.width = "100%")

# Reuse make_volcano / make_gsea_bar — just need a nebula cell counts csv
# If you don't have one, we can skip the cell count annotation
nebula_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(nebula_results_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  df_ct <- nebula_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  
  # NEBULA uses logFC / p_val — rename to match make_volcano expectations
  df_ct <- df_ct |>
    dplyr::rename(
      P.Value   = p_group,       # update to your actual NEBULA column names
      adj.P.Val = fdr,
      logFC     = logFC_group, 
      gene      = gene
    )
  
  p_volc <- make_volcano(df_ct, ct, cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = NA))
  
  if (ct %in% names(nebula_gsea_list)) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(nebula_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
    nebula_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(nebula_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") + theme_void()
  }
  
  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.2))
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}

```

```{r}
cat("\n\n# GSEA Leading Edge Genes — NEBULA {background-color=\"#a53860\"}\n\n")

for (ct in names(nebula_gene_tables)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " — Leading Edge Genes {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  tbl <- nebula_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")
  
  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}

```

## Organoid Comparison Single-Cell (NEBULA) vs. Pseudobulk (LIMMA)
```{r}

shared_cts <- intersect(unique(results_all$cell_type), unique(nebula_results_all$cell_type))

for (ct in shared_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " — limma vs. NEBULA {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  df_limma <- results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  df_nebula <- nebula_results_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct) |>
    dplyr::rename(P.Value = p_group, adj.P.Val = fdr, logFC = logFC_group)
  
  p_limma_vol  <- make_volcano(df_limma,  ct) + ggtitle("Pseudobulk (limma)")
  p_nebula_vol <- make_volcano(df_nebula, ct,
                               cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = NA)) +
                  ggtitle("Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  
  if (ct %in% names(gsea_results_list) && ct %in% names(nebula_gsea_list)) {
    p_limma_gsea  <- make_gsea_bar(gsea_results_list[[ct]],  ct, n_show = 15) + ggtitle("GSEA — limma")
    p_nebula_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(nebula_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) + ggtitle("GSEA — NEBULA")
    combined <- (p_limma_vol | p_nebula_vol) / (p_limma_gsea | p_nebula_gsea)
  } else {
    combined <- p_limma_vol | p_nebula_vol
  }
  
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}

```

```{r}

cat("\n\n# Limma vs. NEBULA Overlap {background-color=\"#005f73\"}\n\n")

sig_threshold <- 0.05
shared_cts <- intersect(unique(results_all$cell_type), unique(nebula_results_all$cell_type))

for (ct in shared_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  # --- Overlapping DE genes ---
  limma_sig <- results_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct, adj.P.Val < sig_threshold) |>
    dplyr::pull(gene)
  
  nebula_sig <- nebula_results_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct, fdr < sig_threshold) |>
    dplyr::pull(gene)
  
  overlap_genes <- intersect(limma_sig, nebula_sig)
  
  cat("**Overlapping significant DE genes:**", length(overlap_genes),
      "of", length(limma_sig), "(limma) and", length(nebula_sig), "(NEBULA)\n\n")
  
  if (length(overlap_genes) > 0) {
    limma_dir <- results_all |>
      dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct, gene %in% overlap_genes) |>
      dplyr::select(gene, logFC_limma = logFC, adjP_limma = adj.P.Val)
    
    nebula_dir <- nebula_results_all |>
      dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct, gene %in% overlap_genes) |>
      dplyr::select(gene, logFC_nebula = logFC_group, adjP_nebula = fdr)
    
    gene_overlap_tbl <- dplyr::inner_join(limma_dir, nebula_dir, by = "gene") |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        concordant = sign(logFC_limma) == sign(logFC_nebula),
        logFC_limma  = round(logFC_limma, 3),
        logFC_nebula = round(logFC_nebula, 3),
        adjP_limma   = formatC(adjP_limma,  format = "e", digits = 2),
        adjP_nebula  = formatC(adjP_nebula, format = "e", digits = 2)
      ) |>
      dplyr::arrange(concordant)
    
    tbl <- gene_overlap_tbl |>
      kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE) |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 13, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
      kableExtra::row_spec(which(!gene_overlap_tbl$concordant), background = "#fff3cd")
    
    cat(as.character(tbl))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  # --- Overlapping pathways ---
  if (ct %in% names(gsea_results_list) && ct %in% names(nebula_gsea_list)) {
    
    limma_sig_paths  <- gsea_results_list[[ct]] |> dplyr::filter(pval < sig_threshold) |> dplyr::pull(pathway)
    nebula_sig_paths <- nebula_gsea_list[[ct]]  |> dplyr::filter(pval < sig_threshold) |> dplyr::pull(pathway)
    overlap_paths    <- intersect(limma_sig_paths, nebula_sig_paths)
    
    cat("**Overlapping significant pathways:**", length(overlap_paths),
        "of", length(limma_sig_paths), "(limma) and", length(nebula_sig_paths), "(NEBULA)\n\n")
    
    if (length(overlap_paths) > 0) {
      limma_path_df  <- gsea_results_list[[ct]] |>
        dplyr::filter(pathway %in% overlap_paths) |>
        dplyr::select(pathway, NES_limma = NES, pval_limma = pval)
      
      nebula_path_df <- nebula_gsea_list[[ct]] |>
        dplyr::filter(pathway %in% overlap_paths) |>
        dplyr::select(pathway, NES_nebula = NES, pval_nebula = pval)
      
      path_overlap_tbl <- dplyr::inner_join(limma_path_df, nebula_path_df, by = "pathway") |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          pathway = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
          pathway = stringr::str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", pathway)),
          concordant_NES = sign(NES_limma) == sign(NES_nebula),
          NES_limma  = round(NES_limma, 2),
          NES_nebula = round(NES_nebula, 2),
          pval_limma  = formatC(pval_limma,  format = "e", digits = 2),
          pval_nebula = formatC(pval_nebula, format = "e", digits = 2)
        ) |>
        dplyr::arrange(concordant_NES)
      
      tbl2 <- path_overlap_tbl |>
        kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE) |>
        kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 13, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
        kableExtra::row_spec(which(!path_overlap_tbl$concordant_NES), background = "#fff3cd")
      
      cat(as.character(tbl2))
      cat("\n\n")
    }
  }
}

```

# Aim 1.2a: Type 2 Diabetes vs. Lean Controls in Biopsies {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}
## Biopsy: Pseudobulk (LIMMA) - T2D vs. LC (Unadjusted) {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-biopsy-data, cache=FALSE}
# ── Load biopsy limma results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
biopsy_limma_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC",
                                 pattern = "^limma_biopsy_T2DvsLC_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
biopsy_limma_files <- biopsy_limma_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", biopsy_limma_files)]
biopsy_results_all <- purrr::map_dfr(biopsy_limma_files, read.csv)

# ── Load biopsy GSEA results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
biopsy_gsea_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC/GSEA",
                                pattern = "^gsea_reactome_biopsy_T2DvsLC_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
biopsy_gsea_files <- biopsy_gsea_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", biopsy_gsea_files)]
biopsy_gsea_list <- purrr::map(biopsy_gsea_files, read.csv) |>
  setNames(gsub("gsea_reactome_biopsy_T2DvsLC_|\\.csv$", "", basename(biopsy_gsea_files)))

biopsy_cell_counts <- read.csv("/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC/cell_counts_per_celltype.csv")
```

```{r biopsy-per-celltype, fig.width=14, fig.height=6, results='asis', cache=FALSE}
biopsy_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(biopsy_results_all$cell_type)) {
  
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  p_volc <- make_volcano(biopsy_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct), ct,
                         cell_counts_df = biopsy_cell_counts)
  
  if (ct %in% names(biopsy_gsea_list)) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(biopsy_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
    biopsy_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(biopsy_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }
  
  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea +
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.2))
  
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

```{r biopsy-gsea-gene-tables, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n# Biopsy GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color=\"#a53860\"}\n\n")

for (ct in names(biopsy_gene_tables)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " — Leading Edge Genes {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  tbl <- biopsy_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")
  
  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Biopsy: Single-Cell (NEBULA) - T2D vs. LC (Unadjusted) {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-nebula-biopsy}
nebula_bio_files <- list.files(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/T2DvsLC NEBULA Biopsy",
  pattern = "^NEBULA_T2DvsLC_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

nebula_bio_all <- purrr::map_dfr(nebula_bio_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.csv(f)
  ct <- gsub("^NEBULA_T2DvsLC_(.*)_.*_2000\\.csv$", "\\1", basename(f))
  df$cell_type <- ct
  df
})

# Detect column names — biopsy NEBULA has no treatment so simpler structure
bio_logfc_col <- grep("^logFC_group", names(nebula_bio_all), value = TRUE)[1]
bio_pval_col  <- grep("^p_group",     names(nebula_bio_all), value = TRUE)[1]
bio_fdr_col   <- grep("^fdr_group",   names(nebula_bio_all), value = TRUE)[1]
gene_col_bio  <- if ("gene" %in% names(nebula_bio_all)) "gene" else "Gene"

cat("Biopsy NEBULA columns detected:\n",
    "logFC:", bio_logfc_col, "\n",
    "pval: ", bio_pval_col,  "\n",
    "fdr:  ", bio_fdr_col,   "\n")
```

```{r run-or-load-nebula-bio-gsea}
out_dir_bio        <- "/home/hhampson/Results/T2DvsLC NEBULA Biopsy"
gsea_rds_files_bio <- list.files(
  out_dir_bio,
  pattern = "_T2DvsLC_Biopsy_Reactome\\.rds$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

if (length(gsea_rds_files_bio) > 0) {
  nebula_bio_gsea_list <- purrr::map(gsea_rds_files_bio, readRDS) |>
    setNames(gsub("_T2DvsLC_Biopsy_Reactome\\.rds$", "",
                  basename(gsea_rds_files_bio)))
  cat("Loaded", length(nebula_bio_gsea_list), "biopsy GSEA result(s) from disk\n")

} else {
  cat("No saved GSEA found — running now\n")
  nebula_bio_gsea_list <- list()

  for (ct in unique(nebula_bio_all$cell_type)) {
    cat("Running GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    df_ct  <- nebula_bio_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
    result <- tryCatch(
      run_nebula_gsea(
        df        = df_ct,
        logfc_col = bio_logfc_col,
        pval_col  = bio_pval_col,
        gene_col  = gene_col_bio
      ),
      error = function(e) { message("GSEA failed for ", ct, ": ", e$message); NULL }
    )
    nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]] <- result
    if (!is.null(result)) {
      ct_clean <- gsub("[/ -]", "_", ct)
      saveRDS(result,
              file.path(out_dir_bio,
                        paste0(ct_clean, "_T2DvsLC_Biopsy_Reactome.rds")))
      cat("Saved GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r nebula-bio-volcano-gsea-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, out.width = "100%")

nebula_bio_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(nebula_bio_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — NEBULA Biopsy\n\n", sep = "")

  df_ct <- nebula_bio_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)

  if (is.na(bio_logfc_col) || all(is.na(df_ct[[bio_pval_col]]))) {
    cat("No results for", ct, "\n\n")
    next
  }

  # ── Volcano ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df_volc <- df_ct |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      logFC      = .data[[bio_logfc_col]],
      pval       = .data[[bio_pval_col]],
      fdr        = .data[[bio_fdr_col]],
      neg_log10p = -log10(pmax(pval, 1e-300)),
      direction  = dplyr::case_when(
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "Up",
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  top_up   <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  top_down <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  to_label <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)

  p_volc <- ggplot(df_volc, aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10p, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
      data         = to_label,
      aes(label    = .data[[gene_col_bio]]),
      size         = 2.5,
      max.overlaps = 30,
      segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Up" = pal$brown_red, "Down" = pal$ink_black, "NS" = "grey70")
    ) +
    labs(
      x        = "log2 Fold Change",
      y        = "-log10(P-value)",
      title    = "Volcano Plot",
      subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_ct), big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Cells: ", format(df_ct$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"),
      color    = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50")
    )

  # ── GSEA bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!is.null(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
      nrow(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20) +
      labs(title = "Reactome GSEA")
    nebula_bio_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(
      nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20
    )
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
               label = "No GSEA results", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }

  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5))
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Biopsy NEBULA GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-bio-gsea-tables}
for (ct in names(nebula_bio_gene_tables)) {
  if (is.null(nebula_bio_gene_tables[[ct]]) ||
      nrow(nebula_bio_gene_tables[[ct]]) == 0) next

  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct),
      " — Biopsy NEBULA Leading Edge {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")

  tbl <- nebula_bio_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      font_size         = 14,
      bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")
    ) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")

  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Biopsy: Single-Cell vs. Pseudobulk Comparison {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-bio-comparison-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 22, fig.height = 14, out.width = "100%")

shared_bio_cts <- intersect(
  unique(biopsy_results_all$cell_type),
  unique(nebula_bio_all$cell_type)
)

for (ct in shared_bio_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Biopsy: limma vs. NEBULA\n\n", sep = "")

  # ── limma data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df_limma <- biopsy_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)

  # ── NEBULA data — rename to match make_volcano expectations ───────────────
  df_nebula <- nebula_bio_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      P.Value   = !!bio_pval_col,
      adj.P.Val = !!bio_fdr_col,
      logFC     = !!bio_logfc_col,
      gene      = !!gene_col_bio
    )

  # ── Volcanos ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_limma_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_limma, ct,
    cell_counts_df = biopsy_cell_counts
  ) +
    labs(title = "Pseudobulk (limma)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_limma), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = adj. P < 0.05"))

  p_nebula_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_nebula, ct,
    cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = df_nebula$Cells[1])
  ) +
    labs(title = "Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_nebula), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Cells: ", format(df_nebula$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"))

  # ── GSEA bars ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_limma_gsea <- if (ct %in% names(biopsy_gsea_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(biopsy_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
               label = "No GSEA results", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  }

  p_nebula_gsea <- if (!is.null(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
                        nrow(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    make_gsea_bar(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
               label = "No GSEA results", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  }

  # ── 2x2 layout ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  combined <- (p_limma_vol | p_nebula_vol) /
              (p_limma_gsea | p_nebula_gsea) +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.4)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Biopsy T2D vs. LC"),
      subtitle = "Left: Pseudobulk (limma)  |  Right: Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
      theme    = theme(
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = pal$ink_black),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey50")
      )
    )

  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```


# Aim 1.3: Compare Organoids to Biopsies{background-color="#a53860"}

## Comparative Cell Types

| Biopsy | Organoid | Combined Label |
|--------|----------|----------------|
| POD | ProlPod | Podocytes |
| DCT | DT | Distal Tubule |
| EC | EEC | Endothelial |
| VSMC/Pericyte | MesV | Vascular Smooth Muscle |

```{r cross-system-setup, cache=FALSE}
# ── Cell type mapping ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cross_map <- list(
  "Podocytes"       = list(biopsy = "POD",            organoid = "ProlPod"),
  "Distal Tubule"   = list(biopsy = "DCT",            organoid = "DT"),
  "Endothelial"     = list(biopsy = "EC",             organoid = "EEC"),
  "Vascular Smooth" = list(biopsy = "VSMC/P",  organoid = "MesV")
)
```

```{r cross-volcano, fig.width=14, fig.height=6, results='asis', cache=FALSE}
for (label in names(cross_map)) {
  
  bio_ct  <- cross_map[[label]]$biopsy
  org_ct  <- cross_map[[label]]$organoid
  
  cat("\n\n## ", label, " — Volcano: Organoid vs. Biopsy {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  # ── Organoid volcano ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  org_df <- results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == org_ct)
  p_org <- if (nrow(org_df) > 0) {
    make_volcano(org_df, org_ct, cell_counts_df = cell_counts) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Organoid: ", org_ct))
  } else {
    ggplot() + annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No data", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0("Organoid: ", org_ct))
  }
  
  # ── Biopsy volcano ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  bio_df <- biopsy_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == bio_ct)
  p_bio <- if (nrow(bio_df) > 0) {
    make_volcano(bio_df, bio_ct, cell_counts_df = biopsy_cell_counts) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Biopsy: ", bio_ct))
  } else {
    ggplot() + annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No data", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0("Biopsy: ", bio_ct))
  }
  
  combined <- p_org + p_bio + plot_layout(ncol = 2)
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

```{r cross-gsea, fig.width=14, fig.height=6, results='asis', cache=FALSE}
for (label in names(cross_map)) {
  
  bio_ct  <- cross_map[[label]]$biopsy
  org_ct  <- cross_map[[label]]$organoid
  
  cat("\n\n## ", label, " — GSEA: Organoid vs. Biopsy {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  # ── Organoid GSEA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_org_gsea <- if (org_ct %in% names(gsea_results_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(gsea_results_list[[org_ct]], org_ct, n_show = 15) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Organoid: ", org_ct))
  } else {
    ggplot() + annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
                        size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0("Organoid: ", org_ct))
  }
  
  # ── Biopsy GSEA ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_bio_gsea <- if (bio_ct %in% names(biopsy_gsea_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(biopsy_gsea_list[[bio_ct]], bio_ct, n_show = 15) +
      ggtitle(paste0("Biopsy: ", bio_ct))
  } else {
    ggplot() + annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
                        size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0("Biopsy: ", bio_ct))
  }
  
  combined <- p_org_gsea + p_bio_gsea + plot_layout(ncol = 2)
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```


# Aim 1.4: High Glucose Exposure (30mM) vs. Low Glucose Expsure (15mM) in Organoids {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}

## Organoid: Pseudobulk (LIMMA) - 30mM vs 15mM (Adj. Group) {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-treatment-data, cache=FALSE}
# ── Load treatment limma results ──────────────────────────────────────────────
treat_limma_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment",
                                pattern = "^limma_treatment_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
treat_limma_files <- treat_limma_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", treat_limma_files)]
treat_results_all <- purrr::map_dfr(treat_limma_files, read.csv)

# ── Load treatment GSEA results ───────────────────────────────────────────────
treat_gsea_files <- list.files("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment",
                               pattern = "^gsea_reactome_treatment_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
treat_gsea_files <- treat_gsea_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", treat_gsea_files)]
treat_gsea_list <- purrr::map(treat_gsea_files, read.csv) |>
  setNames(gsub("gsea_reactome_treatment_|\\.csv$", "", basename(treat_gsea_files)))

# Reuse organoid cell counts (same cells, different comparison)
treat_cell_counts <- read.csv("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma T2D vs. LC/cell_counts_per_celltype.csv")
```

```{r treat-per-celltype, fig.width=14, fig.height=6, results='asis', cache=FALSE}
treat_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(treat_results_all$cell_type)) {
  
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  p_volc <- make_volcano(treat_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct), ct,
                         cell_counts_df = treat_cell_counts)
  
  if (ct %in% names(treat_gsea_list)) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(treat_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
    treat_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(treat_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }
  
  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea +
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.2))
  
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

```{r treat-gsea-gene-tables, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n# 30mM vs 15mM GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color=\"#a53860\"}\n\n")

for (ct in names(treat_gene_tables)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " — Leading Edge Genes {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
  
  tbl <- treat_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")
  
  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Organoid: Single Cell (NEBULA) - 30mM vs 15mM (Adj. Group) {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-nebula-treatment}

nebula_trt_files <- list.files(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/Treatment NEBULA",
  pattern = "^NEBULA_30vs15mM_.*_unadjusted_2000\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

nebula_trt_all <- purrr::map_dfr(nebula_trt_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.csv(f)
  ct <- gsub("^NEBULA_30vs15mM_(.*)_unadjusted_2000\\.csv$", "\\1", basename(f))
  df$cell_type <- ct
  df
})

trt_logfc_col <- "logFC"
trt_pval_col  <- "p_value"
trt_fdr_col   <- "fdr"
gene_col_trt  <- if ("Gene" %in% names(nebula_trt_all)) "Gene" else "gene"
```

```{r run-or-load-nebula-trt-gsea}
out_dir_trt        <- "/home/hhampson/Results/Treatment NEBULA"
gsea_rds_files_trt <- list.files(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/Treatment NEBULA",
  pattern = "^NEBULA_30vs15mM_.*_Reactome\\.rds$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

if (length(gsea_rds_files_trt) > 0) {
  nebula_trt_gsea_list <- purrr::map(gsea_rds_files_trt, readRDS) |>
    setNames(gsub("^NEBULA_30vs15mM_(.*)_Reactome\\.rds$", "\\1",
                  basename(gsea_rds_files_trt)))
  cat("Loaded", length(nebula_trt_gsea_list), "treatment GSEA result(s) from disk\n")

} else {
  cat("No saved GSEA found — running now\n")
  nebula_trt_gsea_list <- list()

  for (ct in unique(nebula_trt_all$cell_type)) {
    cat("Running GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    df_ct  <- nebula_trt_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
    result <- tryCatch(
      run_nebula_gsea(
        df        = df_ct,
        logfc_col = trt_logfc_col,
        pval_col  = trt_pval_col,
        gene_col  = gene_col_trt
      ),
      error = function(e) { message("GSEA failed for ", ct, ": ", e$message); NULL }
    )
    nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]] <- result
    if (!is.null(result)) {
      ct_clean <- gsub("[/ -]", "_", ct)
      saveRDS(result,
              file.path(out_dir_trt,
                        paste0("NEBULA_30vs15mM_", ct_clean, "_Reactome.rds")))
      cat("Saved GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r nebula-trt-volcano-gsea-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, out.width = "100%")

nebula_trt_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(nebula_trt_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — NEBULA Treatment\n\n", sep = "")

  df_ct <- nebula_trt_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)

  if (all(is.na(df_ct[[trt_pval_col]]))) {
    cat("No treatment results for", ct, "\n\n")
    next
  }

  # ── Volcano ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df_volc <- df_ct |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      logFC      = .data[[trt_logfc_col]],
      pval       = .data[[trt_pval_col]],
      fdr        = .data[[trt_fdr_col]],
      neg_log10p = -log10(pmax(pval, 1e-300)),
      direction  = dplyr::case_when(
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "Up",
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  top_up   <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  top_down <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  to_label <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)

  p_volc <- ggplot(df_volc, aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10p, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
      data         = to_label,
      aes(label    = .data[[gene_col_trt]]),
      size         = 2.5,
      max.overlaps = 30,
      segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Up" = pal$brown_red, "Down" = pal$ink_black, "NS" = "grey70")
    ) +
    labs(
      x        = "log2 Fold Change (30mM vs. 15mM)",
      y        = "-log10(P-value)",
      title    = "Volcano Plot",
      subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_ct), big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Cells: ", format(df_ct$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"),
      color    = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50")
    )

  # ── GSEA bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!is.null(nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
      nrow(nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20) +
      labs(title = "Reactome GSEA")
    nebula_trt_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(
      nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20
    )
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
               label = "No GSEA results", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }

  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5))
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## NEBULA Treatment GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-trt-gsea-tables}
for (ct in names(nebula_trt_gene_tables)) {
  if (is.null(nebula_trt_gene_tables[[ct]]) ||
      nrow(nebula_trt_gene_tables[[ct]]) == 0) next

  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct),
      " — Treatment Leading Edge {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")

  tbl <- nebula_trt_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      font_size         = 14,
      bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")
    ) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")

  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Organoid: Treatment — Single-Cell vs. Pseudobulk Comparison {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-trt-comparison-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 22, fig.height = 14, out.width = "100%")

shared_trt_cts <- intersect(
  unique(treat_results_all$cell_type),
  unique(nebula_trt_all$cell_type)
)

for (ct in shared_trt_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Treatment: limma vs. NEBULA\n\n", sep = "")

  # ── limma data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df_limma <- treat_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)

  # ── NEBULA data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df_nebula <- nebula_trt_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      P.Value   = p_value,
      adj.P.Val = fdr,
      logFC     = logFC,
      gene      = .data[[gene_col_trt]]
    )

  # ── Volcanos ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_limma_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_limma, ct,
    cell_counts_df = treat_cell_counts
  ) +
    labs(title = "Pseudobulk (limma)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_limma), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = adj. P < 0.05"))

  p_nebula_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_nebula, ct,
    cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = df_nebula$Cells[1])
  ) +
    labs(title = "Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_nebula), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Cells: ", format(df_nebula$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"))

  # ── GSEA bars ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_limma_gsea <- if (ct %in% names(treat_gsea_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(treat_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
               label = "No GSEA results", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  }

  p_nebula_gsea <- if (!is.null(nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
                        nrow(nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    make_gsea_bar(nebula_trt_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
               label = "No GSEA results", size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  }

  # ── 2x2 layout: volcanos top, GSEA bottom ────────────────────────────────
  combined <- (p_limma_vol | p_nebula_vol) /
              (p_limma_gsea | p_nebula_gsea) +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.4)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — 30mM vs. 15mM"),
      subtitle = "Left: Pseudobulk (limma)  |  Right: Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
      theme    = theme(
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = pal$ink_black),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey50")
      )
    )

  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

# Aim 2: T2D-Specific Glucose Response in Organoids {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}
## Organoid: Pseudobulk (LIMMA) — Interaction (T2D × Glucose) {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-interaction-data}
int_dir <- "/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid_Interaction"

int_limma_files <- list.files(int_dir,
                              pattern = "^limma_interaction_.*\\.csv$",
                              full.names = TRUE)
int_limma_files <- int_limma_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", int_limma_files)]
int_results_all <- purrr::map_dfr(int_limma_files, read.csv)

int_gsea_files <- list.files(file.path(int_dir, "GSEA"),
                             pattern = "^gsea_reactome_interaction_.*\\.csv$",
                             full.names = TRUE)
int_gsea_files <- int_gsea_files[!grepl("allcelltypes", int_gsea_files)]
int_gsea_list <- purrr::map(int_gsea_files, read.csv) |>
  setNames(gsub("gsea_reactome_interaction_|\\.csv$", "", basename(int_gsea_files)))

hm_files <- list.files(file.path(int_dir, "Heatmap_Data"),
                       pattern = "^heatmap_emm_.*\\.csv$",
                       full.names = TRUE)
hm_list <- purrr::map(hm_files, function(f) {
  read.csv(f, row.names = 1)
}) |>
  setNames(gsub("heatmap_emm_|\\.csv$", "", basename(hm_files)))

int_cell_counts <- read.csv(file.path(int_dir, "cell_counts_per_celltype_interaction.csv"))
```

```{r limma-int-volcano-gsea-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, out.width = "100%")

int_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(int_results_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " — Pseudobulk Interaction\n\n", sep = "")

  df_ct  <- int_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  p_volc <- make_volcano(df_ct, ct, cell_counts_df = int_cell_counts)

  if (ct %in% names(int_gsea_list)) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(int_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
    int_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(int_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }

  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5))
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Pseudobulk Interaction GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r limma-int-gsea-tables}
for (ct in names(int_gene_tables)) {
  if (is.null(int_gene_tables[[ct]]) || nrow(int_gene_tables[[ct]]) == 0) next

  cat("\n\n## ", ct, " — Interaction Leading Edge {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")

  tbl <- tryCatch({
    int_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
      kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14,
                                bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
      kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")
  }, error = function(e) {
    int_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
      kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14,
                                bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
  })

  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Pseudobulk Interaction EMM Heatmaps {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r limma-int-emm-heatmaps, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
col_annot <- data.frame(
  Group     = c("LC", "LC", "T2D", "T2D"),
  Treatment = c("15mM", "30mM", "15mM", "30mM"),
  row.names = c("LC_15mM", "LC_30mM", "T2D_15mM", "T2D_30mM")
)
annot_colors <- list(
  Group     = c("LC" = pal$dark_cyan,        "T2D" = pal$brown_red),
  Treatment = c("15mM" = pal$vanilla_custard, "30mM" = pal$golden_orange)
)

for (ct in names(hm_list)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Pseudobulk EMM Heatmap\n\n", sep = "")

  hm_mat    <- as.matrix(hm_list[[ct]])
  hm_scaled <- t(scale(t(hm_mat)))
  col_order <- intersect(c("LC_15mM", "LC_30mM", "T2D_15mM", "T2D_30mM"),
                         colnames(hm_scaled))
  hm_scaled <- hm_scaled[, col_order]

  tryCatch({
    p_hm <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
      hm_scaled,
      cluster_cols      = FALSE,
      cluster_rows      = TRUE,
      show_rownames     = TRUE,
      fontsize_row      = 7,
      fontsize_col      = 10,
      color             = colorRampPalette(c(pal$ink_black, "white", pal$brown_red))(100),
      annotation_col    = col_annot[col_order, , drop = FALSE],
      annotation_colors = annot_colors,
      main              = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Estimated Marginal Means"),
      border_color      = NA,
      silent            = TRUE
    )
    grid::grid.newpage()
    grid::grid.draw(p_hm$gtable)
  }, error = function(e) message("Heatmap error for ", ct, ": ", e$message))

  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Organoid: Single-Cell (NEBULA) — Interaction (T2D × Glucose) {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-nebula-interaction}
nebula_int_files <- list.files(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/Interaction Model NEBULA Organoid",
  pattern = "^NEBULA_T2DvsLC_interaction_.*_unadjusted_2000\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

nebula_int_all <- purrr::map_dfr(nebula_int_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.csv(f)
  ct <- gsub("^NEBULA_T2DvsLC_interaction_(.*)_unadjusted_2000\\.csv$", "\\1", basename(f))
  df$cell_type <- ct
  df
})

int_logfc_col <- grep("^logFC_.*treatment", names(nebula_int_all), value = TRUE)[1]
int_pval_col  <- grep("^p_.*treatment",     names(nebula_int_all), value = TRUE)[1]
int_fdr_col   <- grep("^fdr_.*treatment",   names(nebula_int_all), value = TRUE)[1]
gene_col      <- if ("Gene" %in% names(nebula_int_all)) "Gene" else "gene"

cat("Interaction columns detected:\n",
    "logFC:", int_logfc_col, "\n",
    "pval: ", int_pval_col,  "\n",
    "fdr:  ", int_fdr_col,   "\n")
```

```{r run-or-load-nebula-int-gsea}
out_dir        <- "/home/hhampson/Results/Interaction Model NEBULA Organoid"
gsea_rds_files <- list.files(out_dir, pattern = "_interaction_Reactome\\.rds$",
                              full.names = TRUE)

if (length(gsea_rds_files) > 0) {
  nebula_int_gsea_list <- purrr::map(gsea_rds_files, readRDS) |>
    setNames(gsub("_interaction_Reactome\\.rds$", "", basename(gsea_rds_files)))
  cat("Loaded", length(nebula_int_gsea_list), "GSEA result(s) from disk\n")
} else {
  cat("No saved GSEA found — running now\n")
  nebula_int_gsea_list <- list()

  for (ct in unique(nebula_int_all$cell_type)) {
    cat("Running GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    df_ct  <- nebula_int_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
    result <- tryCatch(
      run_nebula_gsea(df = df_ct, logfc_col = int_logfc_col,
                      pval_col = int_pval_col, gene_col = gene_col),
      error = function(e) { message("GSEA failed for ", ct, ": ", e$message); NULL }
    )
    nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]] <- result
    if (!is.null(result)) {
      ct_clean <- gsub("[/ -]", "_", ct)
      saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir,
                                paste0(ct_clean, "_interaction_Reactome.rds")))
      cat("Saved GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r nebula-int-volcano-gsea-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, out.width = "100%")

nebula_int_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(nebula_int_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — NEBULA Interaction\n\n", sep = "")

  df_ct <- nebula_int_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)

  if (is.na(int_logfc_col) || all(is.na(df_ct[[int_pval_col]]))) {
    cat("No interaction results for", ct, "\n\n")
    next
  }

  df_volc <- df_ct |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      logFC      = .data[[int_logfc_col]],
      pval       = .data[[int_pval_col]],
      fdr        = .data[[int_fdr_col]],
      neg_log10p = -log10(pmax(pval, 1e-300)),
      direction  = dplyr::case_when(
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "Up",
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  top_up   <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  top_down <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  to_label <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)

  p_volc <- ggplot(df_volc, aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10p, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
      data = to_label, aes(label = .data[[gene_col]]),
      size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 30, segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Up" = pal$brown_red, "Down" = pal$ink_black, "NS" = "grey70")
    ) +
    labs(
      x        = "log2 Fold Change (Interaction Term)",
      y        = "-log10(P-value)",
      title    = "Volcano Plot — T2D × Glucose Interaction",
      subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_ct), big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Cells: ", format(df_ct$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"),
      color    = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50"))

  if (!is.null(nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
      nrow(nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20) +
      labs(title = "Reactome GSEA — Interaction Term")
    nebula_int_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(
      nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") + theme_void()
  }

  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5))
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## NEBULA Interaction GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-int-gsea-tables}
for (ct in names(nebula_int_gene_tables)) {
  if (is.null(nebula_int_gene_tables[[ct]]) ||
      nrow(nebula_int_gene_tables[[ct]]) == 0) next

  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct),
      " — NEBULA Interaction Leading Edge {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")

  tbl <- nebula_int_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14,
                              bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")

  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## NEBULA Interaction EMM Heatmaps {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-int-emm-heatmaps, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
for (ct in unique(nebula_int_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — NEBULA Interaction EMM\n\n", sep = "")

  df_ct     <- nebula_int_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  top_genes <- df_ct |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[int_fdr_col]])) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(.data[[int_fdr_col]], n = 50) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data[[gene_col]])

  if (length(top_genes) < 2) { cat("Insufficient genes for", ct, "\n\n"); next }

  ct_orig <- gsub("_", "/", ct)
  so_sub  <- tryCatch(
    subset(so_combined, cell_type_abbrev %in% c(ct, ct_orig)),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(so_sub) || ncol(so_sub) == 0) { cat("Could not subset for", ct, "\n\n"); next }

  top_genes_present <- intersect(top_genes, rownames(so_sub))
  if (length(top_genes_present) < 2) { cat("Genes not found for", ct, "\n\n"); next }

  DefaultAssay(so_sub) <- "RNA"
  expr_mat <- as.matrix(
    Seurat::GetAssayData(so_sub, layer = "data")[top_genes_present, , drop = FALSE]
  )

  meta <- so_sub@meta.data |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      cond = paste0(
        dplyr::case_when(group %in% c("Type 2 Diabetes", "T2D") ~ "T2D", TRUE ~ "LC"),
        "_",
        dplyr::case_when(grepl("30", treatment) ~ "30mM", TRUE ~ "15mM")
      )
    )

  emm_mat   <- sapply(unique(meta$cond), function(cc)
    rowMeans(expr_mat[, rownames(meta)[meta$cond == cc], drop = FALSE]))
  col_order <- intersect(c("LC_15mM", "LC_30mM", "T2D_15mM", "T2D_30mM"), colnames(emm_mat))
  emm_mat   <- emm_mat[, col_order, drop = FALSE]
  hm_scaled <- t(scale(t(emm_mat)))

  col_annot <- data.frame(
    Group     = c("LC", "LC", "T2D", "T2D"),
    Treatment = c("15mM", "30mM", "15mM", "30mM"),
    row.names = c("LC_15mM", "LC_30mM", "T2D_15mM", "T2D_30mM")
  )[col_order, , drop = FALSE]

  tryCatch({
    p_hm <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
      hm_scaled,
      cluster_cols      = FALSE, cluster_rows = TRUE,
      show_rownames     = TRUE,  fontsize_row  = 7, fontsize_col = 10,
      color             = colorRampPalette(c(pal$ink_black, "white", pal$brown_red))(100),
      annotation_col    = col_annot,
      annotation_colors = list(
        Group     = c("LC" = pal$dark_cyan,        "T2D"  = pal$brown_red),
        Treatment = c("15mM" = pal$vanilla_custard, "30mM" = pal$golden_orange)
      ),
      main         = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — NEBULA Top Interaction Genes"),
      border_color = NA, silent = TRUE
    )
    grid::grid.newpage()
    grid::grid.draw(p_hm$gtable)
  }, error = function(e) message("Heatmap error for ", ct, ": ", e$message))

  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Comparison Organoid: Interaction — Single-Cell vs. Pseudobulk  {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-int-comparison-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 22, fig.height = 14, out.width = "100%")

shared_int_cts <- intersect(
  unique(int_results_all$cell_type),
  unique(nebula_int_all$cell_type)
)

for (ct in shared_int_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Interaction: limma vs. NEBULA\n\n", sep = "")

  # ── limma volcano ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df_limma   <- int_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  p_limma_vol <- make_volcano(df_limma, ct, cell_counts_df = int_cell_counts) +
    labs(title    = "Pseudobulk (limma)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_limma), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = adj. P < 0.05"))

  # ── NEBULA volcano ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df_nebula <- nebula_int_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      P.Value   = .data[[int_pval_col]],
      adj.P.Val = .data[[int_fdr_col]],
      logFC     = .data[[int_logfc_col]],
      gene      = .data[[gene_col]]
    )
  p_nebula_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_nebula, ct,
    cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = df_nebula$Cells[1])
  ) +
    labs(title    = "Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_nebula), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Cells: ", format(df_nebula$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"))

  # ── limma GSEA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_limma_gsea <- if (ct %in% names(int_gsea_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(int_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  }

  # ── NEBULA GSEA ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p_nebula_gsea <- if (!is.null(nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
                        nrow(nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    make_gsea_bar(nebula_int_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  }
```
