```{r nebula-int-comparison-loop}
  # ── 2x2 layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  combined <- (p_limma_vol | p_nebula_vol) /
              (p_limma_gsea | p_nebula_gsea) +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.4)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — T2D × Glucose Interaction"),
      subtitle = "Left: Pseudobulk (limma)  |  Right: Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
      theme    = theme(
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = pal$ink_black),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey50")
      )
    )

  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

# Sensitivity Analyses - Full Biopsy Cohort of T2D & LC

## UMAPs - Organoid & Biopsy (Full Sample)

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Biopsy Subset**
```{r}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
knitr::include_graphics("/home/hhampson/Results/umap_biopsy.png")
```
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Biopsy Full Sample**
```{r}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
knitr::include_graphics("/home/hhampson/Results/umap_biopsy_full.png")
```
:::
::::

# Sensitivity Analyses - Full Biopsy Cohort of T2D & LC {background-color="#a53860" color="white"}

## UMAPs - Biopsy Subset vs. Full Sample

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Biopsy Subset**
```{r}
img_raw <- s3$get_object(Bucket = "scrna", Key = "Kidney organoids/UMAP_celltype_biopsy.png")$Body
img_b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(img_raw)
knitr::raw_html(paste0('<img src="data:image/png;base64,', img_b64, '" style="width:100%;">'))
```
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Biopsy Full Sample**
```{r}
img_raw <- readBin("/home/hhampson/Results/UMAP_celltype_biopsy_full.png", 
                   what = "raw", n = file.info("/home/hhampson/Results/UMAP_celltype_biopsy_full.png")$size)
img_b64 <- base64enc::base64encode(img_raw)
knitr::raw_html(paste0('<img src="data:image/png;base64,', img_b64, '" style="width:100%;">'))
```
:::
::::

## Biopsy Full: Pseudobulk (LIMMA) — T2D vs. LC {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-biopsy-full-data}
# ── Load full biopsy limma results ────────────────────────────────────────────
biopsy_full_limma_files <- list.files(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC/Full Dataset",
  pattern = "^Limma_Biopsy_T2DvsLC_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

biopsy_full_results_all <- purrr::map_dfr(biopsy_full_limma_files, function(f) {
  df  <- read.csv(f)
  ct  <- gsub("^Limma_Biopsy_T2DvsLC_(.*)\\.csv$", "\\1", basename(f))
  df$cell_type <- ct
  df
})

# ── Load full biopsy GSEA results ─────────────────────────────────────────────
biopsy_full_gsea_files <- list.files(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC/Full Dataset",
  pattern = "^gsea_reactome_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)
biopsy_full_gsea_list <- purrr::map(biopsy_full_gsea_files, read.csv) |>
  setNames(gsub("^gsea_reactome_(.*)\\.csv$", "\\1", basename(biopsy_full_gsea_files)))

# ── Cell counts ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
biopsy_full_cell_counts <- read.csv(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC/Full Dataset/cell_counts_per_celltype.csv"
)
```

```{r biopsy-full-limma-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, out.width = "100%")

biopsy_full_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(biopsy_full_results_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Biopsy Full Pseudobulk\n\n", sep = "")

  df_ct  <- biopsy_full_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  p_volc <- make_volcano(df_ct, ct, cell_counts_df = biopsy_full_cell_counts)

  if (ct %in% names(biopsy_full_gsea_list)) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(biopsy_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20)
    biopsy_full_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(
      biopsy_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20
    )
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }

  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5))
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Biopsy Full Pseudobulk GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r biopsy-full-limma-gsea-tables}
for (ct in names(biopsy_full_gene_tables)) {
  if (is.null(biopsy_full_gene_tables[[ct]]) ||
      nrow(biopsy_full_gene_tables[[ct]]) == 0) next

  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct),
      " — Biopsy Full Leading Edge {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")

  tbl <- biopsy_full_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14,
                              bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")

  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Biopsy Full: Single-Cell (NEBULA) — T2D vs. LC {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r load-nebula-biopsy-full}
nebula_bio_full_files <- list.files(
  "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy Full T2DvsLC NEBULA",
  pattern = "^NEBULA_Biopsy_Full_T2DvsLC_.*_unadjusted_2000\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

nebula_bio_full_all <- purrr::map_dfr(nebula_bio_full_files, function(f) {
  df <- read.csv(f)
  ct <- gsub("^NEBULA_Biopsy_Full_T2DvsLC_(.*)_unadjusted_2000\\.csv$", "\\1", basename(f))
  df$cell_type <- ct
  df
})

bio_full_logfc_col <- grep("^logFC_group", names(nebula_bio_full_all), value = TRUE)[1]
bio_full_pval_col  <- grep("^p_group",     names(nebula_bio_full_all), value = TRUE)[1]
bio_full_fdr_col   <- grep("^fdr_group",   names(nebula_bio_full_all), value = TRUE)[1]
gene_col_bio_full  <- if ("gene" %in% names(nebula_bio_full_all)) "gene" else "Gene"

cat("Biopsy Full NEBULA columns detected:\n",
    "logFC:", bio_full_logfc_col, "\n",
    "pval: ", bio_full_pval_col,  "\n",
    "fdr:  ", bio_full_fdr_col,   "\n")
```

```{r run-or-load-nebula-bio-full-gsea}
out_dir_bio_full        <- "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy Full T2DvsLC NEBULA"
gsea_rds_files_bio_full <- list.files(
  out_dir_bio_full,
  pattern = "_T2DvsLC_BiopsyFull_Reactome\\.rds$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

if (length(gsea_rds_files_bio_full) > 0) {
  nebula_bio_full_gsea_list <- purrr::map(gsea_rds_files_bio_full, readRDS) |>
    setNames(gsub("_T2DvsLC_BiopsyFull_Reactome\\.rds$", "",
                  basename(gsea_rds_files_bio_full)))
  cat("Loaded", length(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list), "biopsy full GSEA result(s) from disk\n")

} else {
  cat("No saved GSEA found — running now\n")
  nebula_bio_full_gsea_list <- list()

  for (ct in unique(nebula_bio_full_all$cell_type)) {
    cat("Running GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    df_ct  <- nebula_bio_full_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
    result <- tryCatch(
      run_nebula_gsea(
        df        = df_ct,
        logfc_col = bio_full_logfc_col,
        pval_col  = bio_full_pval_col,
        gene_col  = gene_col_bio_full
      ),
      error = function(e) { message("GSEA failed for ", ct, ": ", e$message); NULL }
    )
    nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]] <- result
    if (!is.null(result)) {
      ct_clean <- gsub("[/ -]", "_", ct)
      saveRDS(result,
              file.path(out_dir_bio_full,
                        paste0(ct_clean, "_T2DvsLC_BiopsyFull_Reactome.rds")))
      cat("Saved GSEA for:", ct, "\n")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r nebula-bio-full-volcano-gsea-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 20, fig.height = 8, out.width = "100%")

nebula_bio_full_gene_tables <- list()

for (ct in unique(nebula_bio_full_all$cell_type)) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — NEBULA Biopsy Full\n\n", sep = "")

  df_ct <- nebula_bio_full_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)

  if (is.na(bio_full_logfc_col) || all(is.na(df_ct[[bio_full_pval_col]]))) {
    cat("No results for", ct, "\n\n")
    next
  }

  df_volc <- df_ct |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      logFC      = .data[[bio_full_logfc_col]],
      pval       = .data[[bio_full_pval_col]],
      fdr        = .data[[bio_full_fdr_col]],
      neg_log10p = -log10(pmax(pval, 1e-300)),
      direction  = dplyr::case_when(
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "Up",
        fdr < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  top_up   <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  top_down <- df_volc |> dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) |> dplyr::slice_min(pval, n = 10)
  to_label <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)

  p_volc <- ggplot(df_volc, aes(x = logFC, y = neg_log10p, color = direction)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
      data         = to_label,
      aes(label    = .data[[gene_col_bio_full]]),
      size         = 2.5,
      max.overlaps = 30,
      segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Up" = pal$brown_red, "Down" = pal$ink_black, "NS" = "grey70")
    ) +
    labs(
      x        = "log2 Fold Change",
      y        = "-log10(P-value)",
      title    = "Volcano Plot",
      subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_ct), big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Cells: ", format(df_ct$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                        "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"),
      color    = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50"))

  if (!is.null(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
      nrow(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    p_gsea <- make_gsea_bar(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20) +
      labs(title = "Reactome GSEA")
    nebula_bio_full_gene_tables[[ct]] <- extract_top_genes(
      nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 20
    )
  } else {
    p_gsea <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void()
  }

  combined <- p_volc + p_gsea + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.5))
  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Biopsy Full NEBULA GSEA Leading Edge Genes {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-bio-full-gsea-tables}
for (ct in names(nebula_bio_full_gene_tables)) {
  if (is.null(nebula_bio_full_gene_tables[[ct]]) ||
      nrow(nebula_bio_full_gene_tables[[ct]]) == 0) next

  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct),
      " — Biopsy Full NEBULA Leading Edge {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")

  tbl <- nebula_bio_full_gene_tables[[ct]] |>
    kableExtra::kbl(escape = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "r", "l")) |>
    kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size = 14,
                              bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    kableExtra::column_spec(4, width = "40em")

  cat(as.character(tbl))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Biopsy Full: Single-Cell vs. Pseudobulk Comparison {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-bio-full-comparison-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 22, fig.height = 14, out.width = "100%")

shared_bio_full_cts <- intersect(
  unique(biopsy_full_results_all$cell_type),
  unique(nebula_bio_full_all$cell_type)
)

for (ct in shared_bio_full_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Biopsy Full: limma vs. NEBULA\n\n", sep = "")

  df_limma  <- biopsy_full_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  df_nebula <- nebula_bio_full_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      P.Value   = .data[[bio_full_pval_col]],
      adj.P.Val = .data[[bio_full_fdr_col]],
      logFC     = .data[[bio_full_logfc_col]],
      gene      = .data[[gene_col_bio_full]]
    )

  p_limma_vol <- make_volcano(df_limma, ct,
                              cell_counts_df = biopsy_full_cell_counts) +
    labs(title    = "Pseudobulk (limma)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_limma), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = adj. P < 0.05"))

  p_nebula_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_nebula, ct,
    cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = df_nebula$Cells[1])
  ) +
    labs(title    = "Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_nebula), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Cells: ", format(df_nebula$Cells[1], big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = FDR < 0.05"))

  p_limma_gsea <- if (ct %in% names(biopsy_full_gsea_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(biopsy_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Pseudobulk (limma)")
  }

  p_nebula_gsea <- if (!is.null(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
                        nrow(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    make_gsea_bar(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Single-Cell (NEBULA)")
  }

  combined <- (p_limma_vol | p_nebula_vol) /
              (p_limma_gsea | p_nebula_gsea) +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.4)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — Biopsy Full T2D vs. LC"),
      subtitle = "Left: Pseudobulk (limma)  |  Right: Single-Cell (NEBULA)",
      theme    = theme(
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = pal$ink_black),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey50")
      )
    )

  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Single-Cell Comparison: Biopsy Full vs. Biopsy Subset {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r nebula-bio-subset-vs-full-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 22, fig.height = 14, out.width = "100%")

shared_nebula_cts <- intersect(
  unique(nebula_bio_all$cell_type),
  unique(nebula_bio_full_all$cell_type)
)

for (ct in shared_nebula_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct),
      " — NEBULA: Subset vs. Full Biopsy\n\n", sep = "")

  df_sub  <- nebula_bio_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      P.Value   = .data[[bio_pval_col]],
      adj.P.Val = .data[[bio_fdr_col]],
      logFC     = .data[[bio_logfc_col]],
      gene      = .data[[gene_col_bio]]
    )
  df_full <- nebula_bio_full_all |>
    dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      P.Value   = .data[[bio_full_pval_col]],
      adj.P.Val = .data[[bio_full_fdr_col]],
      logFC     = .data[[bio_full_logfc_col]],
      gene      = .data[[gene_col_bio_full]]
    )

  p_sub_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_sub, ct,
    cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = df_sub$Cells[1])
  ) +
    labs(title    = "NEBULA — Biopsy Subset",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_sub), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Cells: ", format(df_sub$Cells[1], big.mark = ",")))

  p_full_vol <- make_volcano(
    df_full, ct,
    cell_counts_df = data.frame(cell_type = ct, n_cells = df_full$Cells[1])
  ) +
    labs(title    = "NEBULA — Biopsy Full",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_full), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Cells: ", format(df_full$Cells[1], big.mark = ",")))

  p_sub_gsea <- if (!is.null(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
                     nrow(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    make_gsea_bar(nebula_bio_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Subset")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Subset")
  }

  p_full_gsea <- if (!is.null(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]]) &&
                      nrow(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]]) > 0) {
    make_gsea_bar(nebula_bio_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Full")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Full")
  }

  combined <- (p_sub_vol | p_full_vol) /
              (p_sub_gsea | p_full_gsea) +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.4)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — NEBULA: Subset vs. Full Biopsy"),
      subtitle = "Left: Biopsy Subset  |  Right: Biopsy Full Cohort",
      theme    = theme(
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = pal$ink_black),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey50")
      )
    )

  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

## Pseudobulk Comparison: Biopsy Full vs. Biopsy Subset {background-color="#a53860"}
```{r limma-bio-subset-vs-full-loop}
knitr::opts_current$set(fig.width = 22, fig.height = 14, out.width = "100%")

shared_limma_cts <- intersect(
  unique(biopsy_results_all$cell_type),
  unique(biopsy_full_results_all$cell_type)
)

for (ct in shared_limma_cts) {
  cat("\n\n## ", gsub("_", " ", ct),
      " — limma: Subset vs. Full Biopsy\n\n", sep = "")

  df_sub  <- biopsy_results_all      |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  df_full <- biopsy_full_results_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)

  p_sub_vol <- make_volcano(df_sub,  ct, cell_counts_df = biopsy_cell_counts) +
    labs(title    = "Pseudobulk — Biopsy Subset",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_sub), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = adj. P < 0.05"))

  p_full_vol <- make_volcano(df_full, ct, cell_counts_df = biopsy_full_cell_counts) +
    labs(title    = "Pseudobulk — Biopsy Full",
         subtitle = paste0("Genes: ", format(nrow(df_full), big.mark = ","),
                           "  |  Color = adj. P < 0.05"))

  p_sub_gsea <- if (ct %in% names(biopsy_gsea_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(biopsy_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Subset")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Subset")
  }

  p_full_gsea <- if (ct %in% names(biopsy_full_gsea_list)) {
    make_gsea_bar(biopsy_full_gsea_list[[ct]], ct, n_show = 15) +
      labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Full")
  } else {
    ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No GSEA results",
               size = 4, color = "grey50") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "GSEA — Biopsy Full")
  }

  combined <- (p_sub_vol | p_full_vol) /
              (p_sub_gsea | p_full_gsea) +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.4)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0(gsub("_", " ", ct), " — limma: Subset vs. Full Biopsy"),
      subtitle = "Left: Biopsy Subset  |  Right: Biopsy Full Cohort",
      theme    = theme(
        plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = pal$ink_black),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey50")
      )
    )

  print(combined)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
